description: Book list. In Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals. Dating: Probably 13th century. "The number of books of the shaykh [...]. The first: 15. The second: 14. Their details: The Commentary on the Mishna: 5. The Guide (Dallāla): [...]. Commentary on Nidda: [...]. Zād al-Mus[āfir]: [...]. " This fragment was not included in Allony's book. ASE
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
